                         Job Description 

                     

                     
                         
                            BACKGROUND
Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP) is a World Bank assisted project with the objective to enhance the Government’s capacity for digitally enabled public services delivery for citizens and businesses. Ministry of IT & Telecom (MoITT) is the Executing Agency of the project with implementation support from (i) Board of Investment (BoI), (ii) National Database and Registration Authority (NADRA), (iii) Ignite – National Technology Fund and (iv) National IT Board (NITB),
PROJECT DESCRIPTION
DEEP aims to develop a framework and technology to promote digital services across Pakistan, significantly transforming citizen centric unified services nationwide. A key component is the establishment of Civic Innovation and Technology Labs (CITL) as collaboration hubs and platforms for citizens, government, startups, and academia to drive social and civic innovation and address community challenges through technology.
Ignite - National Technology Fund, under the Ministry of IT & Telecommunication focuses on fourth industrial wave tech and ecosystem development initiatives to create a knowledge economy in Pakistan. Its national network of incubators nurtures startups, while the tech innovation grants are offered to innovative, deep tech projects. The Ignite known for its expertise in technology entrepreneurship, is mandated to establish and operate CITL. By leveraging civic technology and innovation, it aims to enhance citizen engagement, improve citizen centric services, and foster transparency.
OBJECTIVES OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The primary objective of Gender Specialist will be to ensure gender-responsive design and implementation of project activities, promoting digital literacy and women’s empowerment in the digital economy, with a focus on STEM and tech-related fields, and to identify and address gender-based barriers to digital inclusion. This position involves developing gender-responsive strategies, conducting gender analysis, and ensuring that all project activities promote gender equality for the digital inclusion and literacy. S/he will work closely with project stakeholders, including government agencies, startups, academia, communities and public at large, to foster an inclusive and equitable approach to digital services and technology innovation. The candidate in collaboration with the M&E team will design tools and mechanisms to monitor and evaluate gender equality outcomes, in compliance with the set indicators under the project. This position will play a crucial role in ensuring that gender considerations are integrated into all the components of the Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP).
The responsibilities include (but not limited to) the following:
1.	Develop and implement a gender strategy and action plan for DEEP, ensuring that gender considerations are integrated into all project components.
2.	Conducting gender analysis, to identify gender gaps and barriers in digital services and technology access.
3.	Designing and delivering gender-sensitivity training and facilitating workshops/webinars on gender equality, inclusion and literacy in tech.
4.	Advocating gender-inclusive digital policies and collaborating with tech hubs, incubators, and academia to promote gender diversity and to design and implement gender-responsive activities.

5.	Supporting initiatives to increase women's participation in digital skills training, entrepreneurship, and leadership, and developing mentorship and networking programs.

6.	Establishing gender-disaggregated indicators, tracking progress, and conduct monitoring and evaluation of project activities on gender equality and women's empowerment.

7.	Support the development of communication materials and outreach campaigns that highlight gender equality and women's participation in digital services.
SCOPE OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The work of the Gender Specialist will include the following tasks (not limited to):
1)	Ensuring that gender considerations are effectively integrated into the DEEP project.
2)	Developing strategies, conducting analysis, providing technical support, and monitoring progress to ensure that the project promotes gender equality and addresses the unique needs of women and marginalized groups. 
3)	Facilitate gender-responsive community engagement and consultations to ensure diverse perspectives are included in project planning and implementation.
4)	Work in collaboration with project teams, stakeholders, and communities to create an inclusive environment that fosters social innovation and enhances citizen engagement.
5)	Represent the project in gender-related forums, conferences, and meetings to build partnerships and promote gender equality initiatives.
6)	Prepare regular reports documenting progress on gender integration and the impact of project interventions on women and girls
7)	Ensure compliance with the World Bank’s Gender and Digital Inclusion guidelines and requirements, adapting methods and reports as needed to meet the standards.
8)	Ensure Gender analysis findings and work plan are well documented in reports.
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE
1)	Minimum 16 years education from a reputable/HEC-recognized university in Development Studies, Gender Studies and/or Social Sciences.
2)	Minimum 08 years of post-qualification experience exclusively in gender mainstreaming, women empowerment in tech/STEM and education, focusing primarily on digital inclusion.
3)	Strong understanding of gender issues in STEM, digital economy and entrepreneurship.
4)	Experience in policy advocacy, capacity building, and gender-responsive M&E.
5)	Excellent communication, interpersonal and stakeholder engagement skills.
ADDITIONAL SKILLS / EXPERTISE

1)	Ability to work effectively in a multicultural environment and with diverse stakeholders.
2)	Experience in World Bank and/or other donor-funded projects.
3)	Strong advocacy and networking skills to promote gender equality initiatives.
4)	Proficiency in project management methodologies and tools.
5)	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
6)	Familiarity with civic technology and social innovation.
7)	Proficiency in multiple languages relevant to the project region is desirable.
SCHEDULE FOR THE ASSIGNMENT
The Gender Specialist will be appointed on a contract basis for a tentative period of 18 Months. However, in case of additional time engagement the process and modalities of extended duration be finalized at the end of contract expiration upon mutual agreement.
REMUNERATION AND OTHER BENEFITS
1.	The consultant will receive remuneration as per the scope of work defined and based on the World Bank guidelines applicable to individual consultants for this position.
2.	Travel expenses as approved by the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan.
3.	This is a consulting-based appointment and does not offer medical or other benefits.

REPORTING OBLIGATIONS
1.	This position is based at Islamabad, Pakistan.
2.	The Gender Specialist will report to the Project Director Ignite PIU, Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP).
3.	The Gender Specialist is required to follow all rules and directives of the Government of Pakistan and the World Bank for the successful implementation of the project.
4.	The Gender Specialist is required to follow working days and timings as per the directives of the Federal Government of Pakistan.
5.	The Gender Specialist is prohibited from working for any other party or a paid job, or taking any other assignment during the course of this contract without written approval from the Competent Authority.
6.	The Gender Specialist shall ensure that all the required reports for the CITL component of project are prepared on time in accordance with the requirements of the Government of Pakistan and the World Bank.

// Save Job Function
function getCsrfToken() {
    const meta = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]');
    if (meta && meta.getAttribute('content')) return meta.getAttribute('content');
    // Fallback to XSRF-TOKEN cookie (Laravel default)
    const match = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(^| )XSRF-TOKEN=([^;]+)'));
    if (match) return decodeURIComponent(match[2]);
    return null;
}

function saveJob(button) {
    const jobId = button.getAttribute('data-job-id') || "8753";
    const token = getCsrfToken();
    const isSaved = button.getAttribute('data-saved') === '1';
    const method = isSaved ? 'DELETE' : 'POST';
    const url = `/candidate/jobs/${jobId}/save`;

    if (!token) {
        if (typeof swal !== 'undefined') {
            swal({ title: 'Missing token', text: 'Session may have expired. Please refresh and try again.', icon: 'warning' });
        } else {
            alert('Missing CSRF token. Please refresh the page and try again.');
        }
        return;
    }

    fetch(url, {
        method: method,
        credentials: 'same-origin',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'X-CSRF-TOKEN': token
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({})
    }).then(async resp => {
        // Redirects or 401/419 mean authentication/authorization or expired session
        if (resp.status === 401 || resp.status === 419 || resp.redirected) {
            if (typeof swal !== 'undefined') {
                swal({ title: 'Login required', text: 'Please login as a candidate to save jobs. Reloading...', icon: 'warning' });
            } else {
                alert('Please login as a candidate to save jobs.');
            }
            // reload so user can re-auth / get fresh CSRF token
            setTimeout(() => { window.location.reload(); }, 1200);
            return;
        }

        let data = null;
        try { data = await resp.json(); } catch (e) { /* non-json */ }

        if (resp.ok && data && data.success) {
            const iconSpan = button.querySelector('.save-btn-icon');
            const textSpan = button.querySelector('.save-btn-text');

            if (method === 'POST') {
                // Saved
                button.setAttribute('data-saved', '1');
                if (iconSpan) iconSpan.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-bookmark"></i>';
                if (textSpan) textSpan.textContent = 'Saved';
                if (typeof Swal !== 'undefined') {
                    Swal.fire({ icon: 'success', title: data.message || 'Job saved', toast: true, position: 'top-end', timer: 2000, showConfirmButton: false });
                } else if (typeof swal !== 'undefined') {
                    swal({ title: data.message || 'Job saved', icon: 'success' });
                }
            } else {
                // Un-saved
                button.setAttribute('data-saved', '0');
                if (iconSpan) iconSpan.innerHTML = '<img src="https://www.njp.gov.pk/assets/save-job.svg" alt="">';
                if (textSpan) textSpan.textContent = 'Save Job';
                if (typeof Swal !== 'undefined') {
                    Swal.fire({ icon: 'success', title: data.message || 'Removed from saved', toast: true, position: 'top-end', timer: 2000, showConfirmButton: false });
                } else if (typeof swal !== 'undefined') {
                    swal({ title: data.message || 'Removed from saved', icon: 'success' });
                }
            }
        } else {
            const msg = (data && data.message) ? data.message : 'Unable to complete the action';
            if (typeof Swal !== 'undefined') {
                Swal.fire({ icon: 'error', title: msg, timer: 3000, showConfirmButton: false });
            } else if (typeof swal !== 'undefined') {
                swal({ title: msg, icon: 'error' });
            } else {
                alert(msg);
            }
        }
    }).catch(err => {
        console.error(err);
        const msg = 'Something went wrong';
        if (typeof Swal !== 'undefined') {
            Swal.fire({ icon: 'error', title: msg, timer: 3000, showConfirmButton: false });
        } else {
            alert(msg);
        }
    });
}

                         Job Description 

                     

                     
                         
                            BACKGROUND
Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP) is a World Bank assisted project with the objective of enhancing the Government’s capacity for digitally enabled public services delivery for citizens and businesses. Ministry of IT & Telecom (MoITT) is the Executing Agency of the project with implementation support from (i) Board of Investment (BoI), (ii) National Database and Registration Authority (NADRA), (iii) Ignite – National Technology Fund and (iv) National IT Board (NITB).
PROJECT DESCRIPTION
DEEP aims to develop a framework and technology to promote digital services across Pakistan, significantly transforming citizen centric unified services nationwide. A key component is the development of Open Data Portal and establishment of Civic Innovation and Technology Labs (CITL) as collaboration hubs and platforms for citizens, government, startups, and academia to drive social and civic innovation and address community challenges through technology.
OBJECTIVES OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The Events Coordination Specialist will facilitate the DEEP and Ministry of IT and act as a bridge between government agencies, organizations, and the event companies. The responsibilities include planning, coordinating, and executing events including workshops, conferences, training, seminars, and public outreach activities. The main objective of this assignment is to ensure efficient planning, and successful execution of organizational events through effective and timely coordination, ensuring high-quality logistics, stakeholder engagement, and visibility. The consultant is expected to foster positive relationships, ensure clear communication, and resolve challenges and issues during events. S/he will ensure inclusive participation for the management companies, government bodies and media, outreach and adoption. 

The responsibilities include (but are not limited to) the following:
1.	Event Planning and Coordination: Plan and organize events including conferences, workshops, trainings, launches, and stakeholder meetings.
2.	Develop Event concepts, Agendas, Timelines, and Implementation Plans: Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to design quality concept notes, agendas and ensure alignment with project or program objectives with effective implementation plans designing.
3.	Logistics Management: Manage event logistics including venue booking, travel arrangements, accommodation, and catering.
4.	Coordinate procurement: including the BOQs finalisation, procurement process and contract designing.
5.	Oversee registration: ensuring quality participant management.
6.	Stakeholder Coordination: 
o	Liaise with speakers, partners, government representatives, and participants. 
o	Manage invitations, confirmations, and communication with attendees.
o	Coordinate with vendors, service providers, and venues.
7.	Budget and Financial Management
o	Prepare event budgets and cost estimates.
o	Track event expenditures and ensure cost efficiency.
o	Maintain financial documentation related to events.
8.	On-site Event Management
o	Oversee event implementation and troubleshoot issues.
o	Manage event staff, volunteers, and vendors during the event.
SCOPE OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The scope of works for the Event Coordination Specialist will include (but not limited to) the following tasks:
1)	Ensure compliance with the World Bank’s and Government of Pakistan Procurement and Evaluation guidelines and requirements, adapting methods and reports as needed to meet their standards.
2)	Develop Annual / quarterly and event-wise implementation plan and timelines
3)	Develop detailed event budgets and logistical plans including BOQs, RFQ/RFPs
4)	Draft post-event reports including participant feedback and consolidation of all material and events coverage
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE
1)	Minimum 16 years education from a reputable/HEC-recognized university in Event Management, Communications, Business Administration, Management and/or closely related field.
2)	Minimum 07 years of post-qualification experience in event planning & coordination for projects and programmes, in development and/or public sector with international/national organisation.
3)	Experience with digital platforms, dashboards, digital task management, and collaboration tools is a must.
4)	Strong analytical and data management skills.
5)	Excellent communication, reporting writing and presentation skills, with the capacity to translate technical information into actionable insights.
6)	Strong project management, budget management skills required
7)	Ability to work under pressure, meet deadlines, and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
ADDITIONAL SKILLS / EXPERTISE
1)	Experience in World Bank and/or other donor-funded projects. 
2)	Proficiency in MS-Office, event management and design tools
3)	Ability to work effectively in a multicultural environment and with diverse stakeholders.
4)	Strong public speaking, inter-personal and facilitation skills.
5)	Knowledge of digital economy trends (digital ID, cybersecurity).
6)	Understanding of gender, and disability-inclusive approaches.
7)	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
SCHEDULE FOR THE ASSIGNMENT
The Events Coordination Specialist will be appointed on a contract basis for an initial period of one year. Extension of the position is contingent to project lifecycle and the budget availability.
The successful candidate is expected to commence the services in April 2026.	
REMUNERATION AND OTHER BENEFITS
1)	The consultant will receive remuneration as per the scope of work defined and based on the World Bank guidelines applicable to individual consultants for this position.
2)	Travel expenses as approved by the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan.
3)	This is a consulting-based appointment and does not offer medical or other benefits.
REPORTING OBLIGATIONS
1)	This position is based at Islamabad, Pakistan.
2)	The Events Coordination Specialist will report to the Program Director, Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP).
3)	The Events Coordination Specialist is required to follow all rules and directives of the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan for successful implementation of the project.
4)	This is a full-time position and Specialist is required to follow working days and timings as per the directives of the Federal Government of Pakistan.
5)	The Specialist is required to report to work in an official attire.
6)	The Events Coordination Specialist is prohibited from working for any other party or a paid job or taking any other assignment during the course of this contract without written approval from the Competent Authority.
7)	The Events Coordination Specialist shall ensure that all the required reports for the project are prepared on time in accordance with the requirements of the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan.

                         Job Description 

                     

                     
                         
                            BACKGROUND
Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP) is a World Bank assisted project with the objective of enhancing the Government’s capacity for digitally enabled public services delivery for citizens and businesses. Ministry of IT & Telecom (MoITT) is the Executing Agency of the project with implementation support from (i) Board of Investment (BoI), (ii) National Database and Registration Authority (NADRA), (iii) Ignite – National Technology Fund and (iv) National IT Board (NITB).
PROJECT DESCRIPTION
DEEP aims to develop a framework and technology to promote digital services across Pakistan, significantly transforming citizen centric unified services nationwide. A key component is the development of Open Data Portal and establishment of Civic Innovation and Technology Labs (CITL) as collaboration hubs and platforms for citizens, government, startups, and academia to drive social and civic innovation and address community challenges through technology.
OBJECTIVES OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The Events Coordination Associate will assist the Events Coordination Specialist in facilitating the event coordination and management for the DEEP and Ministry of IT through vendor management, BOQs finalization, and venue management. The responsibilities include assistance in planning, coordinating, and executing events including workshops, conferences, training, seminars, and public outreach activities. The main objective of this assignment is to ensure efficient and effective event coordination and planning for the support of Specialist with timely coordination, ensuring high-quality logistics, stakeholder engagement, and visibility. The consultant is expected to resolve on-ground challenges and issues during events. 
The responsibilities include (but are not limited to) the following:
1.	Assist in Event Planning and Coordination: for planning and organize events including conferences, workshops, trainings, launches, and stakeholder meetings.
2.	Assist in developing Event Concepts, Agendas, Timelines, and Implementation Plans: Assist and coordinate with internal teams and external partners to design quality concept notes, agendas and ensure alignment with project or program objectives with effective implementation plans designing.
3.	Assist in Logistics Management: including venue booking, travel arrangements, accommodation, and catering.
4.	Assist in Coordinate procurement: including the BOQs finalisation, procurement process and contract designing.
5.	Assist in Oversee registration: ensuring timely and quality participant management.
6.	Assist in Stakeholder Coordination: 
o	Liaise with vendors and suppliers and other stakeholders. 
o	Manage invitations, confirmations, and communication with attendees.
o	Assist and coordinate with vendors, service providers, and venues.
7.	Assist in Budget and Financial Management
o	Assist in preparing event budgets and cost estimates.
o	Track event expenditures and ensure cost efficiency.
o	Maintain financial documentation related to events.
8.	On-site Event Management
o	Oversee event implementation and troubleshoot issues.
o	Manage event staff, volunteers, and vendors during the event.
SCOPE OF THE ASSIGNMENT
The scope of works for the Event Coordination Associate will include (but not limited to) the following tasks:
1)	Ensure compliance with the World Bank’s and Government of Pakistan Procurement and Evaluation guidelines and requirements, adapting methods and reports as needed to meet their standards.
2)	Assist in developing Annual / quarterly and event-wise implementation plan and timelines
3)	Assist in developing detailed event budgets and logistical plans including BOQs, RFQ/RFPs
4)	Draft post-event reports including participant feedback and consolidation of all material and events coverage
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE
1)	Minimum 16 years education from a reputable/HEC-recognized university in Event Management, Communications, Business Administration, Management and/or closely related field.
2)	Minimum 04 years of post-qualification experience in event planning & coordination for projects and programmes, in development and/or public sector with international/national organisation.
3)	Experience with digital platforms, dashboards, digital task management, and collaboration.
4)	Strong analytical and data management skills.
5)	Excellent communication, reporting writing and presentation skills, with the capacity to translate technical information into actionable insights.
6)	Strong project management, budget management skills
7)	Ability to work under pressure, meet deadlines, and manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
ADDITIONAL SKILLS / EXPERTISE
1)	Experience in World Bank and/or other donor-funded projects. 
2)	Proficiency in MS-Office, event management and design tools
3)	Ability to work effectively in a multicultural environment and with diverse stakeholders.
4)	Understanding of gender, and disability-inclusive approaches.
5)	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
SCHEDULE FOR THE ASSIGNMENT
The Events Coordination Associate will be appointed on a contract basis for an initial period of one year. Extension of the position is contingent to project lifecycle and the budget availability.
The successful candidate is expected to commence the services in April 2026.	
REMUNERATION AND OTHER BENEFITS
1)	The consultant will receive remuneration as per the scope of work defined and based on the World Bank guidelines applicable to individual consultants for this position.
2)	Travel expenses as approved by the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan.
3)	This is a consulting-based appointment and does not offer medical or other benefits.
REPORTING OBLIGATIONS
1)	This position is based at Islamabad, Pakistan.
2)	The Events Coordination Associate will report to the Events Coordination Specialist and Program Director, Digital Economy Enhancement Project (DEEP).
3)	The Events Coordination Associate is required to follow all rules and directives of the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan for successful implementation of the project.
4)	This is a full-time position and consultant is required to follow working days and timings as per the directives of the Federal Government of Pakistan.
5)	The Associate is required to report to work in an official attire.
6)	The Events Coordination Associate is prohibited from working for any other party or a paid job or taking any other assignment during this contract without written approval from the Competent Authority.
7)	The Events Coordination Associate shall ensure that all the required reports for the project are prepared on time in accordance with the requirements of the World Bank and the Government of Pakistan.

Automation & AI Manager Dubai, United Arab Emirates Apply Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires. Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan. 
 We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster. About the role 
 Careem’s mission includes simplifying and improving the lives of people across our region — and Care plays a vital role in making that mission real. As part of the Care Analytics, Automation, and Project Management team, you’ll use data and technology to enhance how we serve our customers, captains, and partners. From supporting building automation that reduces effort, to driving analytics that uncover experience gaps, you’ll help shape systems that create impact across the region. 
 This is a hands-on role within Care where you’ll program manage automation solutions , deliver data-driven insights, and manage impactful projects. In this hands-on position you’ll manage data-led and AI-powered initiatives in Care, support in automating workflows, optimizing performance, getting in-depth data analytics and managing projects that transform how we serve our users, alongside a talented team that’s driving meaningful change. 
 What you’ll do 
 
 Program manage the end-to-end automation program roadmap for Careem Care: including but not limited to self-service flows, AI-driven triage, proactive notifications, and escalation automation  
 Partner with business and care leads across verticals (Food, Quik, Pay, etc.) to analyze contact drivers, disposition trends, and pain points to identify automation and process improvement opportunities. 
 Collaborate with Care and org-wide Engineering, Product, verticals, data science, and Operations to program manage and support roll out AI-enabled solutions that enhance care efficiency and quality of delivery 
 Drive change management to ensure successful adoption of automation tools across Careem’s regional care teams. 
 Support building care strategy across verticals , closely liaising with functional teams 
 Lead cross-functional projects, managing dependencies, timelines, and risks while maintaining strong stakeholder communication. 
 Localize and roll out solutions tailored and compliant to each market (UAE, Jordan, KSA)  
 Explore and pilot emerging AI/ML technologies (e.g., NLP, conversational AI, RPA) to enhance Careem’s automation capabilities. 
 Build clear documentation of systems, workflows, and success metrics to support scalability and transparency. 
 Work with real-world data and translate it into features, signals, and insights 
 Improve the way we serve and monitor machine learning models 
 Contribute to a strong team culture of learning, iteration, and accountability 
 Track performance metrics (contact rate, deflection rate, NPS/CSAT, automation accuracy, FCR) and provide insights and recommendations for continuous improvement 
 Translate insights into data-backed actions in coordination with the respective teams 
 Champion a “Care-First Automation” culture — leveraging technology to elevate the customer experience, not just reduce costs. 
 
 What you need 
 Must-haves: 
 
 Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related technical field 
 6+ years of experience working with machine learning program management, analytics in any form- ideally in tech, e-commerce, or service excellence organizations. 
 Solid Python skills, especially with libraries like pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn 
 A strong grasp of ML fundamentals like classification, regression, cross-validation, and evaluation metrics 
 Familiarity with at least one ML framework such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or XGBoost 
 Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools. 
 Proven track record of translating data insights into business strategy and measurable impact.   
 Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools - ability to translate complex data into simple narratives. 
 Familiarity with CRM and Care platforms (Zendesk, Salesforce, or equivalent) and workflow automation tools. 
 
 Nice-to-haves: 
 
 Exposure to deep learning techniques in call center 
 Experience working with large datasets using Spark, Hive, and cloud tools 
 Familiarity with model deployment and monitoring workflows (Airflow, MLflow, etc.) 
 Interest in solving real operational challenges for customers, captains and partners  
 A GitHub profile or project portfolio that shows what you’ve built. 
 
   
 What you’ll get 
 
 A chance to work on AI problems, data-analytics at regional scale that improve lives and drive real business outcomes 
 A smart, motivated team that values learning and practical impact 
 Flexibility to work remotely, with strong support for collaboration and ownership 
 A front-row seat to how AI is transforming mobility, delivery, and digital services in emerging markets 
 
 What we’ll provide you 
 We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to: 
 
 Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues. 
 Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential. 
 Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day. 
 Work 4 days a week in office & 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.) 
 Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.
